subject: Added scripts for manual smoke testing
commit_message:
Added scripts for manual smoke testing

Added some scripts, docker compose and config files
This is to aid in manual smoke testing
Policy gui and policy backend have been added

Issue-ID: POLICY-4000
Change-Id: Ia89cab416b02ab034c65ba8224536cde2f65c0c5
Signed-off-by: saul.gill <saul.gill@est.tech>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Thanks Saul for doing this and making it available for everyone.

Patch Set 2:

Can people please have a look at this review?

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

We could do some refactoring to reuse the existing config files, same as how csit and grafana setup works, but can be looked at later.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1
> 
> We could do some refactoring to reuse the existing config files, same as how csit and grafana setup works, but can be looked at later.

I agree to avoid the duplicates, see this one for reference @saul - https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/policy/docker/+/127030.   I think probably best to do the consolidation now not being a critical fix that other folks are waiting.

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1
> 
> > Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1
> > 
> > We could do some refactoring to reuse the existing config files, same as how csit and grafana setup works, but can be looked at later.
> 
> I agree to avoid the duplicates, see this one for reference @saul - https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/policy/docker/+/127030.   I think probably best to do the consolidation now not being a critical fix that other folks are waiting.

Hi @Jorge and @Ajith. I have made the adjustments as you suggested to reuse config files in the same way as has been done in the quoted review.
